title: Pink Iron, More
description: Changes most of the iron items (and chainmail) into a pink/magenta tint
body:
Basic pack whipped up quickly to change iron things and chainmail armor into a tint of pink/magenta

Only the iron trapdoor was unchanged due to me being unable to make it a matching tint of pink.
![Only the iron trapdoor was unchanged due to me being unable to make it a matching tint of pink.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aec721193ccc37400c3b8dc8691b013e8fe8e42.png)








<details>
<summary></summary>


I DIDNT REALIZE SOMEONE ELSE MADE A SIMILAR PACK 4 MONTHS AGO IM SO SORRY

</details>
